body:
All publishable packages SHALL live under `pkgs/`.

Initial package set:

- `ssot-registry`
- `ssot-contracts`
- `ssot-views`
- `ssot-codegen`
- `ssot-cli`
- `ssot-tui`

Deferred package:

- `ssot-registry-npm`
summary: All publishable packages SHALL live under `pkgs/`.
title: Monorepo package topology under `pkgs/`
